structurePatterns.style: Hand-drawn line art, CSS border-radius simulating irregular shapes, dashed outlines
structurePatterns.idle: Fox tilting head, looking at tangled yarn
structurePatterns.weaving: Fox focused, needles crossing with thread
structurePatterns.completed: Fox holding up finished fabric, cheering
structurePatterns.confused: Fox scratching head, broken thread visible
structurePatterns.celebrating: Fox surrounded by yarn balls, confetti

usageHints.loading: Weaving state with subtle bounce animation
